episode_name: Final Old Homs siege pocket and evacuation
geographic_scope: Old Homs / central urban siege pocket
admin_units: Old City of Homs, Homs Governorate
theater_description: The encircled Old City districts and directly connected central neighborhoods that were still under siege and later evacuated in early 2014.
geometry_method_note: Limited to the old-city pocket explicitly described in Reuters and OHCHR reporting. Whole-city and governorate populations were rejected.
military_area_note: Fighter presence is acknowledged because evacuee flows increasingly consisted of rebels and their relatives, but no direct death series for the final pocket is strong enough for a combatant baseline numerator.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure is not converted into a denominator because trapped-population counts repeatedly merge civilians with fighters or with men of fighting age under screening.
split_reason: The estimable part of the siege is the final January-May 2014 pocket, where trapped-population and evacuation nodes are explicit even though direct violent death numerators remain weak.
quality_note: Entrapment and evacuation evidence is strong, but the final-pocket direct violent death data are not separable enough to publish a baseline DR.
